The '''Equalizer''' was a shoulder-mounted [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. The weapon was designed to immobilize shielded [[armored fighting vehicle]]s. The Equalizer was a disposable weapon, comprised of four two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] tubes that each held a single ion bolt. Weighing twelve [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]], the weapon was fired from the shoulder using the side mounted targeting gear to align the ion cannon with the target vehicle. The inbuilt [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] analyze various factors from the target, including range, speed and angle of deflection. The onboard [[microcomputer]] then used this information and adjusted each individual ion bolts' flight angle. Each ion bolt was discharged individually, and once all four shots had been fired, the weapon was discarded.<ref name="ISB" />

Vehicles hit by the Equalizer's ion bolts suffered power failure which left them vulnerable to attack from standard weaponry such as [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], although some smaller vehicles found that their entire electronic systems were fused by the ion bolt. The weapon was also effective against low-flying aircraft and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The Equalizer was in common use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], especially amongst [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]]-based forces.<ref name="ISB" />
